title: Kelach #3625
definition:
Calah = "vigour"

 1) one of the most ancient cities of Assyria; maybe modern 'Nimrud'
    located at the confluence of the Tigris and Zab rivers
nasbUsage:

    located at the confluence of the Tigris and Zab rivers
